conversation.content: True or False: The Roman Empire fell in 476 CE. Answer your final answer Answer: True or False

False. The deposition of Romulus Augustulus in 476 CE marks the fall of the Western Roman Empire, but the Eastern Roman (Byzantine) Empire continued until 1453 CE, so saying "The Roman Empire fell in 476 CE" is imprecise.

then the answer: False

False. The year 476 CE marks the deposition of the last Western Roman emperor (Romulus Augustulus) and thus the end of the Western Roman Empire, but the Eastern Roman (Byzantine) Empire continued with Roman institutions and identity until 1453 CE, so the claim that "the Roman Empire fell in 476 CE" is imprecise.
